evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Direct experience with LangGraph and LangChain, with examples of complex projects or contributions to these frameworks.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: No experience with LangGraph or LangChain, or only familiarity with similar technologies.

evaluation_criteria.criterion: Proficiency in Python and AI/ML frameworks
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Strong proficiency in Python, with experience in AI/ML frameworks such as Mistral, Phi, or similar quantized models.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: Limited or no experience with Python or AI/ML frameworks.

evaluation_criteria.criterion: Experience with real-time system design and WebSockets
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Direct experience with designing scalable backend systems that support low-latency communication using WebSockets.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: No experience with real-time system design or WebSockets.

evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Experience with containerization using Docker, and ensuring AI services are production-ready and portable.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: Limited or no experience with containerization or DevOps practices.

evaluation_criteria.criterion: API development and SQL optimization skills
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Strong skills in API development and SQL optimization, with experience in designing efficient database systems.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: Limited or no experience with API development or SQL optimization.

evaluation_criteria.criterion: Education and certifications in Computer Science and Data Science
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, with a degree or certification in Data Science, or currently pursuing one.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: No relevant education or certifications in Computer Science or Data Science.

evaluation_criteria.criterion: Experience with multi-agent architectures and stateful systems
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Experience with designing and implementing stateful, multi-agent architectures where AI models can plan, execute, and correct their own actions.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: Limited or no experience with multi-agent architectures or stateful systems.

evaluation_criteria.criterion: Familiarity with open-source Small Language Models
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Familiarity with open-source Small Language Models such as Mistral, Phi, or Llama, and experience with optimizing and deploying them.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: No experience or familiarity with open-source Small Language Models.

evaluation_criteria.criterion: Experience with cyclic graphs and state management
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Experience with managing cyclic graphs and state between agent interactions, using frameworks like LangChain and LangGraph.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: Limited or no experience with cyclic graphs or state management.

evaluation_criteria.criterion: Contribution to AI/ML communities or open-source projects
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Contributions to AI/ML communities or open-source projects, such as LangGraph, LangChain, or similar frameworks.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: No contributions to AI/ML communities or open-source projects.

results.name: Sampath
results.content: Sampath Krishna Tekumalla Bengaluru, India 561203 • +91-9490523667 • kittu.tekumalla@gmail.com • linkedin.com/in/sampath2211 • github.com/Sampath-2211 # EXECUTIVE SUMMARY Final-year Computer Science student specializing in multi-agent AI workflows with hands-on experience in LangChain, LangGraph, and Docker. Passionate about building scalable LLM-powered applications. Proven ability to translate complex technical workflows into user-friendly, production-ready AI systems through academic research and industry experience at the National Remote Sensing Center, ISRO. # EDUCATION | Gitam University - CGPA: 8.36 | Sep 2022 - Apr 2026 | | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------- | | Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science Engineering | Bengaluru, India | | Coursework: DSA, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, DBMS, Design and Analysis of Algorithms, Artificial Intelligence. | | | Indian Institute of Technology, Madras - CGPA: 7.0 | Sep 2023 - Apr 2027 | | Bachelor of Science in Data Science | Remote | | Coursework: Mathematics, Probability and Statistics, Computational Intelligence, Python. | | # WORK EXPERIENCE # National Remote Sensing Center, ISRO May 2025 - August 2025 AI Engineer Intern, Earth and Climate Sciences Area (ECSA) - Hyderabad, India # Agentic AI For Satellite Geospatial Data Inference Advisors: Rounaq Goenka - Situation: Geospatial data analysis required technical expertise, preventing non-technical users from accessing insights from spatial datasets through complex programming requirements. - Task: To build an AI system enabling users to analyse geospatial data through simple natural language queries without domain expertise. - Action: Integrated LangChain for function-calling capabilities, architected a modular workflow with LangGraph, and deployed Mistral 7B for natural language query processing and response generation, alongside Phi-3 Mini for Python code generation. - Result: Successfully built an AI-powered application that democratizes geospatial analysis, allowing non-technical users to obtain insights through conversational queries. # SKILLS PROGRAMMING LANGUAGES AND LIBRARIES: C, Python, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, SQL. SOFTWARE TOOLS: OnlineGDB, Google Colab, Visual Studio Code, Anaconda-Navigator, Docker. AI/ML FRAMEWORKS: LangChain, LangGraph, Ollama # PROJECTS # Vehicle Data Management System for Autonomous Vehicles Jul, 2024 - Oct, 2024 - Engineered a structured database to store and manage vehicle GPS data, sensor readings, and system status for real-time monitoring. - Structured SQL tables and optimized query structures to enable efficient tracking of vehicle locations, battery levels, and engine performance. - Developed automated logging and data organization processes, reducing manual data retrieval time by 50%. - Implemented SQL views and joins to streamline fleet management, improving reporting accuracy and data-driven decision-making. # Real Time Communication with Multiple Clients and Server GitHub Mar, 2024 - Aug, 2024 - Architected and developed a WebSocket-based real-time chat system supporting simultaneous multi-client communication, boosting collaboration efficiency. - Optimized server response times, reducing message latency to under 100ms to ensure smooth, real-time interactions. - Created an interactive and secure HTML-based interface with access control features, enhancing authentication and user security. - Incorporated file-sharing functionality with permission-based access, improving data protection and preventing unauthorized usage. # CERTIFICATIONS - Google Cloud - Google Cloud Computing Foundations: Cloud Computing Fundamentals - Google Cloud - Google Cloud Computing Foundations: Infrastructure in Google Cloud - Python Programming - Programming for Everybody (Getting Started with Python) - University of Michigan # WORKSHOPS - Participated in the “Code, Create & Conquer – Unleash Your Brilliance” Hackfest, organized by the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at GITAM (Deemed to be University), Bengaluru, from October 13–15, 2023. - As a member of the Software-Defined Vehicles section at MURTHI LAB, I had the opportunity to demonstrate a self-designed autonomous buggy developed in collaboration with VIRYA Technologies and Infosys at the “Connected, Autonomous & Electric Vehicle EXPO 2025”, held at KTPO, Bengaluru, on April 24–25, 2025 — showcasing real-time navigation capabilities to CEOs and industry leaders. # EXTRA-CURRICULAR ACTIVITIES - Technical Lead of G-Studio, the official photography club of GITAM University Bangalore, overseeing technical operations and providing support for photography events since August 2024 – May 2025. - Silver Medalist in school-level badminton competition; active player representing college events. - Secured 1st place in a school-wide painting competition while in 5th grade, outperforming senior grades up to 10th.
